overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green trench coat walking through a fog-shrouded residential town. A female companion in a purple jacket appears intermittently. The atmosphere is thick with dense fog, limiting visibility to reveal only silhouettes of street lamps, power lines, and occasional brick buildings.

entered.detail: tall ornate black street lamp emerging from the fog
paved road with faded white lane markings
barely visible building outline in heavy fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a man in a green trench coat walking through extremely dense fog. A woman in a purple jacket walks alongside him on the left before exiting the frame. The surroundings are limited to faint silhouettes of street lamps and the asphalt road surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy street lined with utility poles

agents.ego_description: walking alone down the foggy road, passing wooden utility poles and sparse vegetation

overhead electrical wires stretching across the fog
faint silhouettes of trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking alone through the thick fog, with wooden utility poles and power lines becoming prominent features on the right side. The environment remains desolate and empty, with only the faint shapes of distant trees visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined foggy road approaching a retaining wall

agents.ego_description: proceeding down a road increasingly lined with trees on both sides

entered.detail: tall tree with sparse foliage emerging from fog
large concrete wall or embankment visible through the fog ahead

segments.scene_description: The road becomes more enclosed as trees line both sides, their autumn foliage barely visible through the gray fog. A large concrete retaining wall or structure looms ahead in the distance, partially obscured by the mist.

events.description: female companion in purple jacket reappears from the right side and walks alongside

agents.ego_description: walking past brick residential buildings as the female companion rejoins from the right

notable_agents.action: woman in purple leather jacket catching up and walking alongside the main character

red octagonal stop sign on metal pole

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a residential area with distinct brick houses featuring porches and white trim. The woman in the purple jacket reappears on the right, walking alongside the main character as they pass a stop sign and mailbox on the left.

events.description: companion in purple jacket becomes visible again on the right side

agents.ego_description: approaching parked cars in the fog with the companion walking on the right

notable_agents.action: woman in purple jacket walking on the right side of the frame

entered.detail: multi-story red brick apartment building with multiple windows
dark colored sport utility vehicle parked on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the foggy street, passing a larger brick apartment building on the left and approaching a parked SUV ahead. The female companion remains visible on the right side as they move deeper into the mist-shrouded residential area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, fog-shrouded road that gradually transitions into a quiet residential neighborhood. It begins by following a man in a green trench coat and a woman in a purple jacket through an oppressive mist where only the asphalt and faint silhouettes of street lamps are visible. As the woman exits the frame, the camera continues forward past wooden utility poles and power lines before the road becomes more enclosed by the muted colors of autumn trees and a looming concrete structure in the distance. The scene then opens into a residential area featuring brick houses with white trim, where the woman reappears on the right as they pass a stop sign and mailbox. Finally, the movement carries them deeper into the mist, passing a large brick apartment building and approaching a parked SUV.
